title: CCL - Close/reopen the app
scenario: Verify that the CCL setting in Device Settings > Advanced is retained and displayed correctly after closing and reopening the app.
steps: Open the app and navigate to Device Settings > Advanced.
Select a CCL setting (e.g., a specific value or option).
Close the app completely (force close or exit).
Navigate back to Device Settings > Advanced.
expected: The previously selected CCL setting is retained and displayed correctly after reopening the app.
